subject: Cannot log into my computer - password expired
body: Hi, I tried to log in this morning but it says my password has expired. I have an urgent report due at 9am. Please help ASAP.

subject: No internet connection at my desk
body: My internet has been down since I arrived. I cannot connect to any websites or internal systems. My IP address shows 169.254.x.x.

subject: Microsoft Teams keeps crashing
body: Teams crashes every time I try to join a meeting. I have reinstalled it twice. Error code: 0xCAA70007. This is affecting my whole team.

subject: Server disk usage at 94% - critical alert
body: Received automated alert. FILE-SVR-01 disk C: is at 94% capacity. Services may begin failing if not addressed.

subject: Need access to shared drive Q:
body: I have just joined the Legal team and need access to the Q: shared drive for case documents. My manager is claire.west@company.com.

subject: Laptop running very slowly, takes 10 mins to boot
body: My laptop has been extremely slow for the past week. Takes about 10 minutes to boot and programs freeze constantly. Model: Dell Latitude 5520.
